Citations

If you use KKT-HardNet for benchmarking or research purposes, please cite:

@article{iftakher2025physics,
  title={Physics-informed neural networks with hard nonlinear equality and inequality constraints},
  author={Iftakher, Ashfaq and Golder, Rahul and Roy, Bimol Nath and Hasan, MM Faruque},
  journal={Computers \& Chemical Engineering},
  pages={109418},
  year={2025},
  publisher={Elsevier}
}

Additional links:

  • Journal article: https://doi.org/10.1016/j.compchemeng.2025.109418

  • Preprint: https://arxiv.org/pdf/2507.08124
